items.title_en: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
items.title_zh: Meta 聘请 Alexandr Wang 构建新的人工智能模型一年后，扎克伯格不得不将其出售
items.desc_en: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.
items.desc_zh: 马克·扎克伯格的巨额支出始于一年前，当时他吸引亚历山大·王来监督一项新的人工智能战略。迄今为止的结果并不令人印象深刻。

items.title_en: Trump heads to G7 summit in France as world awaits Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普前往法国参加七国集团峰会，世界等待伊朗协议
items.desc_en: The Iran war has drawn the world's focus, but the G7 is also likely to address Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争吸引了世界的焦点，但七国集团也可能会讨论俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争，这场战争仍在东欧肆虐。

items.desc_zh: 捷蓝航空面临来自美国航空大本营迈阿密国际机场的激烈竞争。

items.title_en: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.title_zh: 初步预测称瑞士选民拒绝接受1000万人口上限

items.desc_zh: 并非所有选票都已清点，但目前的趋势表明 55% 的参与者投票反对该提案。

items.title_en: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克十多年前就与拉里·佩奇分道扬镳，但他们的公司比以往任何时候都更加亲密
items.desc_en: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 和谷歌有着长期而复杂的关系，但本周，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的公司举行了轰动一时的 IPO，两家公司都在庆祝。

items.title_en: After 53 years, the New York Knicks are NBA champions. And the wait sure seemed worth it
items.title_zh: 53 年后，纽约尼克斯队夺得 NBA 冠军。等待似乎是值得的

items.title_en: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
items.title_zh: 国际足联将向索马里裁判阿坦支付全额世界杯费用

items.desc_zh: 被拒绝进入美国执法世界杯的索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦仍将从国际足联获得全额比赛费用。

items.title_en: Armed men kidnap high-ranking security official in Haiti
items.title_zh: 武装人员绑架海地高级安全官员
items.desc_en: James Boyard's abduction is the highest-ranking abduction in the violence-wracked country in recent years, according to reports.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，詹姆斯·博亚德的绑架案是这个饱受暴力蹂躏的国家近年来最严重的绑架案。

items.title_en: Why the US economy keeps defying the odds
items.title_zh: 为什么美国经济不断逆境而行
items.desc_en: Why has the American economy continued to outperform so many of its peers, despite facing the same global shocks?
items.desc_zh: 尽管面临同样的全球冲击，为什么美国经济的表现仍继续优于许多其他国家？

items.title_en: Nigerian author accuses hospital of stalling review into her son's death
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚作家指责医院拖延对她儿子死亡的审查
items.desc_en: Adichie's 21-month old son died in a Lagos hospital, which she says is trying to stop an inquest into the circumstances of his death.
items.desc_zh: Adichie 21 个月大的儿子在拉各斯一家医院去世，她说该医院正在试图阻止对其死因的调查。

items.title_en: As Trump turns 80, what's it really like to work as an octogenarian?
items.title_zh: 特朗普80岁了，作为一个八旬老人工作到底是什么感觉？
items.desc_en: As President Donald Trump celebrates his birthday, we ask people who have worked into their 80s themselves about what it takes to keep going.
items.desc_zh: 在唐纳德·特朗普总统庆祝他的生日之际，我们向那些已经工作到 80 多岁的人们询问如何才能继续前进。

items.title_en: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯家庭利用人工智能“复活”在乌克兰遇害的亲人
items.desc_en: The highly controversial trend lies at the intersection of Russia's war on Ukraine, new AI technologies and grief.
items.desc_zh: 这一备受争议的趋势出现在俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争、新的人工智能技术和悲伤的交汇点上。

items.title_en: Norway braces for verdict in rape trial of crown princess's son Høiby
items.title_zh: 挪威准备等待对王储妃儿子霍伊比强奸案的审判
items.desc_en: Marius Borg Høiby will appear via video link, almost three months after his trial came to an end on 40 charges, including four counts of rape.
items.desc_zh: 马吕斯·博格·霍伊比 (Marius Borg Høiby) 将通过视频连线出庭，此时距离他的 40 项指控（包括四项强奸罪）的审判结束近三个月。

items.desc_zh: 一个被称为“虚拟父母”的小众内容创作者群体在年轻人中非常受欢迎。

items.title_en: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
items.title_zh: 从 10% 的成功机会到 2 万亿美元的市值：SpaceX 历史性的 IPO
items.desc_en: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.
items.desc_zh: 周五在纳斯达克上市后，SpaceX 成为美国第六大最有价值公司，尽管其规模仅相当于科技巨头的一小部分。

items.title_en: These stocks are the most overbought or oversold after a choppy week on Wall Street
items.title_zh: 在华尔街动荡的一周之后，这些股票是最超买或超卖的股票
items.desc_en: Reaction to earnings reports led Adobe to become oversold, while J.M. Smucker Company was left overbought.
items.desc_zh: 对收益报告的反应导致 Adob​​e 超卖，而 J.M. Smucker Company 则超买。

items.title_en: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike, Trump says
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国在空袭中击毙了委内瑞拉特伦·德·阿拉瓜帮派头目
items.desc_en: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统在社交媒体帖子中写道，尼诺·格雷罗在“迅速而致命的动能袭击”中丧生。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's stratospheric rise to trillionaire status - in charts
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 跃升为万亿富翁——图表
items.desc_en: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.
items.desc_zh: BBC 详细分析了这位科技大亨的财富是如何增长的。

items.title_en: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
items.title_zh: 一项估计发现，2027 年社会保障 COLA 可能会跃升至 4.7%。该图表显示价格推动上涨
items.desc_en: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.
items.desc_zh: 随着通胀攀升，社会保障受益人的生活成本可能会在 2027 年出现更高的调整。以下是过去 12 个月中涨幅最大的成本。

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person - and might even soon become a trillionaire.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界首富，甚至可能很快成为万亿富翁。

items.title_en: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.desc_zh: 适用于 macOS 的终极媒体转换器

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
items.title_zh: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
items.desc_en: Product Hunt analytics beyond the daily leaderboard
items.desc_zh: 每日排行榜之外的产品搜寻分析

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Conan
items.title_zh: Conan
items.desc_en: A native Mac cockpit for Claude Code
items.desc_zh: Claude Code 的原生 Mac 驾驶舱

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。
